description: Synthetic-target verification report for the published simulator FPV camera calibration (ADR-0021). SIM / NOT FOR FLIGHT: a self-consistency check of a simulated pinhole fit, never a measurement of real HUD optics. Regenerated deterministically by pilotage_adapter_api::calibration::verify_sim_recovery; the test `sim_recovery_is_within_documented_tolerance` enforces the tolerances below, so this artifact cannot drift out of tolerance unnoticed.

alignmentErrorBudget.description: The calibration's conservative contribution to the downstream conformal alignment error budget. Only the allowance COMPONENTS are stored (and hashed) in the artifact; radiansPerPixel and the totals below are DERIVED (schema v2), never stored, so they cannot understate the components. Recovered quantities are measured; declared-not-recovered quantities carry an engineering allowance with a rationale, never zero (validated). Total is a worst-case linear sum, surfaced through browser admission.

rationale.distortionModelAllowancePx: ideal-pinhole model; sub-pixel allowance for residual model mismatch
rationale.extrinsicsRotationAllowanceRad: mount rotation declared from the sim pose, not recovered; few-mrad engineering allowance
rationale.boresightAllowanceRad: boresight declared as the optical axis, not measured
rationale.designEyeAllowanceRad: 1 cm design-eye positional allowance at a 50 m reference range
